children.heading: Presentation
children.label: a Presentation
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (b), all claims for removal costs or damages shall be presented first to the responsible party or guarantor of the source designated under .section 2714(a) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: if the President has advertised or otherwise notified claimants in accordance with ;section 2714(c) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: by a responsible party who may assert a claim under ;section 2708 of this title

children.label: C
children.text: by the Governor of a State for removal costs incurred by that State; or

children.label: D
children.text: by a United States claimant in a case where a foreign offshore unit has discharged oil causing damage for which the Fund is liable under .section 2712(a) of this title

children.heading: Limitation on presenting claim
children.label: 2 Limitation on presenting claim
children.text: No claim of a person against the Fund may be approved or certified during the pendency of an action by the person in court to recover costs which are the subject of the claim.
each person to whom the claim is presented denies all liability for the claim, or

the claim is not settled by any person by payment within 90 days after the date upon which (A) the claim was presented, or (B) advertising was begun pursuant to , whichever is later,section 2714(b) of this title

children.heading: Uncompensated damages
children.label: d Uncompensated damages
children.text: If a claim is presented in accordance with this section, including a claim for interim, short-term damages representing less than the full amount of damages to which the claimant ultimately may be entitled, and full and adequate compensation is unavailable, a claim for the uncompensated damages and removal costs may be presented to the Fund.

children.heading: Procedure for claims against Fund
children.label: e Procedure for claims against Fund
children.text: The President shall promulgate, and may from time to time amend, regulations for the presentation, filing, processing, settlement, and adjudication of claims under this Act against the Fund.
